Blood Smear 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a blood smear? 
A blood smear is a test that's used to help diagnose and monitor a wide variety of blood disorders Â and other conditions that affect your blood. The test checks a sample of your blood under a microscope to see whether your blood cells look normal. It looks at your:
Red blood cells (RBCs) , which carry oxygen from your lungs to the rest of your body 
White blood cells (WBCs) , whic
